title: agrostis stolonifera var. hackelii
intro: Agrostis stolonifera var. hackelii, also known as creeping bentgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Agrostis stolonifera var. hackelii include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or teas, and can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
